title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Even in Loss

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I couldn't get the win... My mind and my
knees were both too tense...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could win with vibes like this. But
it wasn't only me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How could this happen? How shameful...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Um... McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Palmer... We both still have a long way
to go, it seems. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This is reality. This race is still beyond us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I mean, we just gotta throw in the towel, I
guess...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You mean to give up? This is no time to be giving
up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I cannot allow things to end here. We have our
next races, and then we have next year's spring
Tenno Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We must continue to train. We must continue to
work hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For the Mejiro name we love and believe in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(So McQueen just thinks she's not good enough
yet...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(But it's not just that I'm not good enough. No,
I...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What's the matter, Palmster? C'mon, cheer up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mejiro Palmer doesn't manage to crack a
smile for the rest of the evening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I feel so small and so... insignificant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer looks up at the ceiling and lets out
a soft sigh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna be tied down by the Mejiro name,
so I thought I'd show more of my real self...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But when I saw how serious McQueen was, I didn't
know what else there even was to run for besides
the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I figured I'd run for my own freedom, but... what's
that freedom even for? For sating my own selfish
desires? Or is it for something else?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what it is, but is that reasoning something
I can really be proud of in front of McQueen? Can
it even be compared to her own determination?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's because it was the spring Tenno Sho, which is just so important to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I wanna get back to my real self, even just a
little... So for my next race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She trails off gloomily. A festival race might the
best thing to pick her mood up. In which case...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let's enter the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios blurts out the race name,
sounding energetic yet mournful.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be, like, so fire to run together?! It'll
be like this never happened. We can just bring
the vibes, bestie-style!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it's a festival race! Everyone's there to get
pumped and have a good time anyway! So, like,
you know...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah... The Takarazuka Kinen could be good...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She gives a slight nod. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Takarazuka Kinen, we need to take
another look at what racing means to Mejiro
Palmer.
